rules.Daemonic: This model has a 5+ Invulnerability Save.
rules.Daemonic Engine: This model has a 5+ Invulnerability Save and is immune to the secondary effects of Weapon Disabled and Crew Stun. It still takes the additional Wounds from the Penetration Charts.
rules.Daemonic Thirst: A weapon with this rule inflicts a Mortal Wound on its bearer in each of your Command Phases if you did not cause a Wound with the weapon during the last Turn. This does not trigger on Turn 1.
rules.Malicious Volleys: If this model does not count as Moving this Turn, it may treat weapons with the Bolter rule as if they were in half range.
rules.Marks: Marks of Chaos are optional upgrades for units. Marks perform the following enhancements to units. Stats in Bold have this baked into the profile. Psychic Mastery Level # models and units may only use the corresponding spell list with their Marks.
rules.Mark of Khorne: This model gains A+1 and Furious Charge. Khorne Spell List. Khorne Spells use the Sacrifice mechanic to cast. Instead of rolling to cast, a Khorne Caster spends a number of Skulls to meet the Sacrifice # requirement. Deny the Witch does not work on Sacrifice rituals. A Caster starts the game with a number of Skulls equal to their Psychic Mastery Level. They gain one Skull for each model they slay (not their unit), and may sacrifice friendly models for one Skull each within 6". Khorne Spell List S +5 points Bloodgorge Sacrifice 3 User - - S +5 points Warp Gateway Sacrifice 2 - - S +22 points Blood Torrent Sacrifice 1 Hatred of Magick Sacrifice 1/die - - User - - S +25 points This model gains A+3, but each roll of a 1 To Hit inflicts 1 Mortal Wound. Lasts until your next Psychic Phase. Target unit may declare Charges on the turn they arrived from Reserves. Target unit gains Shroud This model may roll 1 extra Deny the Witch dice per Sacrifice paid until your next Psychic Phase. These dice may only be used once each, but this model may Deny the Witch unlimited times with the default 2 dice for free. S +26 points Ascension Sacrifice 30 User - - S +57 points Tear in Reality Sacrifice 10 - - This model gains M+2, S+2, T+2, W+2, I+2, A+2, and is fully Healed. A model may only be ascended once. Summon 10 Bloodletters as if they had just arrived from Deepstrike, but they do not Scatter. This cannot be Cast on Turn 1.
rules.Pure Blessings: Pure Blessings of Chaos are an added layer of enhancement. Most models will only gain access to Pure Blessings if they come with a Mark by default. The only way to gain a Pure Blessing is to have an entire army of the Mark of the same god, or to have an Undivided Mark for each exception. The Pure Blessing adds to the existing Mark's benefits. For example, a Mark of Khorne grants A+1 and the Pure Blessing results in A+1 for a total of A+2. Other Pure Blessings of the same army count as Marks of the same god for the purpose of army building. Stats in Bold have this baked into the profile. Please note that a unit with the Mark of Khorne by default will not include a Pure Blessing of Khorne A+1 baked into its profile if it is an upgrade option.

rules.Seeking Violence: All Infantry models in your army count as half a model for Contesting

rules.Bridge of Fire: All models in your army gain Outflank.
rules.Redblade Rider Flagship: All models in your army must start in Reserve.
rules.World Eaters: Your army may include World Eaters units.
rules.World Eater: Your army may include World Eaters units.

rules.Barely Restrained Bloodlust: All units in your army must roll a Ld test in your Command Generic Blood Throne Blood Throne
rules.Chariot: This model inflicts d6 Auto Hits at S5 AP3+ on the phase is counts as Charging before any models fight.
rules.Gorefeast: For each model slain by Blade of Blood, this model Heals 1 Wound. This is an exception to the normal Heal rules, but this model cannot exceed its starting Wounds.
rules.Locus of Khorne: 6" Aura, this model and target unit with the Mark of Khorne gain S+1.
rules.Rage Eternal: If this model is targeting a single model with all of its attacks, this model may reroll failed To Hit rolls.
rules.Rampage: If this model's unit is outnumbered in Melee, this model gains A+d3 (randomized each Melee phase).
rules.Infectious Rage: 6" Aura, this model and target unit gain A+1.
rules.Lord of Chaos: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll 1s To Hit.
rules.Lord of Chao: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll 1s To Hit.
rules.Righteous Slaughter: 6" Aura, target unit does not fall back after losing Combat Resolution and failing its modified Ld test.
rules.Veil Torn Asunder: The first time this model is slain, do not remove it from the battlefield. In your next Command Phase, roll a d6. On a 3+ Angron stands back up with d3 Wounds.
rules.Miasma of Rage: 6" Aura, this model and target unit receive A+1 on the phase they successfully Charge.
rules.Regenerate: This model Heals 1 Wound in each of your Command Phases.
rules.Murderous Assault: Each unsaved Wound this model inflicts grants another immediate attack. These extra attacks do not generate further attacks.
rules.The Betrayer: Each 1 this model rolls To Hit instead hits this model's unit. These Hits cannot be resolved against Kharn.
rules.Leading the Charge: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll failed Charge rolls.
rules.Ruinstorm: 12" Aura, target unit suffers -1 To Cast.
rules.Rage Embodied: 12" True Aura, this model and all friendly units gain A+1 and automatically pass all Ld Tests.
rules.Collar of Khorne: This unit can Deny the Witch at Psychic Mastery Level 0.
rules.Executioner: This model may choose the target of its Challenge. The target may not deny the Challenge.
rules.Blood for the Blood God: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll failed Charge rolls.
rules.Animalistic: This model cannot Claim or Contest Objective Markers. Brass Caller of Bloody
rules.Vengeance: This unit can Deny the Witch at Psychic Mastery Level 2.
rules.Prey of the Blood God: During your first Command Phase, nominate one enemy Independent Character on the table or in Reserves. This model gains a +1 To Wound or Penetrate that model.
rules.Locus of Decapitation: 6" Aura, this model and target unit with the Mark of Khorne may reroll 1s To Wound. M+2, T+1, W+2, Sv3+, gain Goring Horn, gain Steed.
rules.Deranged Cultists: This model must declare Charges against the closest enemy unit.
rules.Deranged Cultist: This model must declare Charges against the closest enemy unit.
rules.Stimms: This model has Shock Assault Jakhal: Infantry World Eaters Mark of Khorne Furious Charge
rules.Stimm: This model has Shock Assault Jakhal: Infantry World Eaters Mark of Khorne Furious Charge
rules.Scorn of the Blood God: This model may Deny the Witch twice per Psychic Phase at Psychic Mastery level 2
rules.The Deathbringer: This model gains A+d3 when outnumbered in Melee and is treated as having Grenades for the purposes of Charging Cover.
rules.Infernal Machine: This model Repairs 1 Wound in each of your Command Phases.
rules.Consumes All: Each weapon targets the closest unit, friend or foe even if it has to hit itself with Templates. If no unit is in range and the weapon arc it will target the closest terrain feature instead.
rules.Create Panic: This model displaces all models when it moves, place them up to 1" Away. Immobile units prevent this model from moving there.
rules.Nuclear Meltdown: This model explodes on a 4+ with S Destroyer AP1+ in a 6d6" Radius.
rules.Towering God Engine: This model may only be hit on a 5+ or worse in Melee.
rules.Titanic God Engine: This model may ignore all NonTitanic models and Terrain for the purposes of Moving, Advancing, Falling Back, and Charging. World Ending Hammer - Monster or Vehicle units slain by these attacks can be thrown up to 48" away, scattering like a template and causing Auto Hits against each model underneath them at their S# with AP-. Titanic units can be thrown this way, but only up to 24" Instead and inflict S# AP2+. Roll for Explodes after the slain unit comes to a rest and Auto Hits are resolved.
rules.Skull Dispensary: Any model slain within 6" grants +1 Skull. Any Khorne Caster within 6" may use Skulls from the Repository to fuel their Ritual Spells.

wargear.Augar Array: 6" Aura, target unit does not scatter when Deepstriking. This Aura is cast when the first model is placed prior to scattering.
wargear.Extra Armour: You may treat Crew Stun results as Weapon Disabled instead.
wargear.Flare Launchers: This model has a 5+ Invulnerability Save vs ranged attacks.
wargear.Mark of Khorne: Khorne Mark model/unit only. May Deny the Witch as if Psychic Mastery Level 1.
wargear.Recovery Gear: Roll a d6, on a 5+ Repair the secondary effect from a Crew Stun or Immobilized Result.
wargear.Sigil of Corruption: This model has a 4+ Invulnerability Save.
wargear.Smoke Launchers: 6" Range, put 5" Smoke Cloud that causes -1 To Hit and scatters to move an extra +1" until your next Command Phase. One Use Only. Use in your Shooting Phase Only.

rules.name: Daemonic Engine Stables
rules.description: All Daemonic Engines in your army gain Scout.

rules.name: Khorne Consecration
rules.description: All models in your army automatically Restrain during Combat Resolution and never Pursue.

rules.name: Seeking Violence
rules.description: All Infantry models in your army count as half a model for Contesting Objective Markers.

rules.name: Khorne
rules.description: Your Warlord must have the Mark of Khorne.

rules.name: Angron's Bodyguards
rules.description: Your army may include World Eater units, but they still must follow the rules for Daemonic Guard.

rules.name: Daemonic Guard
rules.description: Your army can only include units with the Daemonic or Daemonic Engine keyword. All models in your army gain Bodyguard but cannot Claim or Contest Objective Markers.

rules.name: Fearsome Foes
rules.description: All units in your army gain the following ability. Fearsome Foes - 6" Aura, target unit must take a Fear Test.

rules.name: Khorne
rules.description: Your Warlord must have the Mark of Khorne.

rules.name: Bridge of Fire
rules.description: All models in your army gain Outflank.

rules.name: Redblade Rider Flagship
rules.description: All models in your army must start in Reserve.

rules.name: World Eaters
rules.description: Your army may include World Eaters units.

rules.name: Khorne
rules.description: Your Warlord must have the Mark of Khorne.

rules.name: Bloodthirsty Madmen
rules.description: All models in your army Auto Hit their own unit on a 1 To Hit in Melee. Kharn inflicts a Mortal Wound instead of an Auto Hit.

rules.name: World Eaters
rules.description: Your army may include World Eaters units.

rules.name: Khorne
rules.description: Your Warlord must have the Mark of Khorne.

rules.name: Barely Restrained Bloodlust
rules.description: All units in your army must roll a Ld test in your Command Phase. If they fail, they must perform a Compulsory Move directly towards the closest enemy model. They must perform Charges against this target if able to, and cannot Advance or fire weapons that would disqualify them from Charging. Origin of the Berzerker: Khorne Berzerkers may be taken as a Troop Choice in your army. Only Seeing Red: All models in your army gain +2 to Charge rolls. Khorne: Your Warlord must have the Mark of Khorne.
